wiki.summary: “MANNEQUIN” (also dubbed as “TECHDECK” by fans) showcases Che rap-screaming over a Jerk instrumental, while xaviersobased takes over the middle portion of the track. The Jerk beat, which was produced by frequent collaborator, CXO, consists of a high-pitched synths, strings, and sliding leads, which are supported by a hard-hitting kick drum and fast-paced percussion, very reminiscent of the EDM sound. Che would perform the track in full at the Clout Festival in Poland, revealing xaviersobased’s feature. Read more on Last.fm.
